zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ann Carlton於1569年出生在英國艾可布萊崔時，她的父親William Carlton31歲，母親Joan Margaret Rippingale21歲。她於大約1582年與Edward Clay在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年在英國享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ann Carlton于1569年出生在英国艾可布萊崔时，她的父亲William Carlton31岁，母亲Joan Margaret Rippingale21岁。她于大约1582年与Edward Clay在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年在英国享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carlton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern and eastern England): habitational name from any of various places called Carlton (Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Durham, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, East Yorkshire, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire) or Carleton (Cumberland, Lancashire, Norfolk, Yorkshire). All come from Old Norse karl ‘common man, peasant’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Charlton ). Places spelled Carl(e)ton (as opposed to Charlton) are in areas of Scandinavian settlement, mostly in northern England.

variants.name: Carleton
meanings: English (northern and eastern England): variant of   Carlton  .
Irish (Ulster): adopted in Northern Ireland as an Anglicized form of Ó Cairealláin, see Carolan 2.

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ann Carlton was born in 1569, in Braintree, Essex, England, her father, William Carlton, was 31 and her mother, Joan Margaret Rippingale, was 21. She married Edward Clay about 1582, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1639, in England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Ann Carlton est née en 1569, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Carlton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Margaret Rippingale, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Clay environ 1582, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1639, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Carltonが1569年にイギリスエセックスブレイントレで生まれた時，父William Carltonは31歳，母Joan Margaret Rippingaleは21歳であった。約1582年にイギリスイギリスでEdward Clayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年にイギリスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Carlton(이)가 1569년 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Carlton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Margaret Rippingale(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1582년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Edward Clay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ann Carlton родилась в 1569 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Carlton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Margaret Rippingale, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Clay около 1582 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1639 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет.
